title: Language update notifications
scenario: Language update notification does not appear when app is backgrounded during firmware update on Device Settings > Language screen
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and pair/connect a supported Bluetooth headset.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Language.
3. Select a supported language from the list.
5. Observe the popup window that appears.
6. Observe the "Software update - Three easy steps" screen with animation.
7. While the update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
8. Check the device notification area for a notification indicating "device update is in progress".
9. Wait for the language update to complete.
10. Check the device notification area for a notification indicating the device has been updated.
expected: A notification appears showing "device update is in progress" when the app is backgrounded during the update. After the update completes successfully, a notification is shown indicating the device has been updated.
